items.title: Transfer news: Newcastle sign Monaco’s Bamba, Summerville joins Al-Hilal
items.summary: Midfielder agrees five-year contract after £34m move Dutch winger leaves West Ham in deal worth £60m Newcastle have made Aladji Bamba their fourth signing of the summer after the 20-year-old midfielder ­completed a move from Monaco for a fee that could rise to £34m. “I’m very happy to be here,” said

items.title: Axed top-tier ref sues bosses over ‘bullying’ after claiming he was put in a choke-hold at a training camp
items.summary: AN axed top-tier ref is suing bosses — claiming he was put in a choke-hold at a training camp. The unnamed official loses his £100,000-a-year salary as one of five demoted from the Premier League and the Championship next season. items.title: Aston Villa in transfer talks to sign £65m-rated Chelsea star Nicolas Jackson as Ollie Watkins edges towards exit
items.summary: ASTON VILLA have opened talks with Chelsea to sign £65million-rated Senegal striker Nicolas Jackson. And Ollie Watkins could be on his way out of Villa Park as Fenerbahce push to land the 30-year-old England forward. Unai Emery is determined to capture Jackson, 25, after securing Alejandro Garnacho

items.title: Man City goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma marries wife Alessia in lavish ceremony with Haaland and wag in attendance
items.summary: GIANLUIGI DONNARUMMA got married in his native Italy today with a host of football friends in attendance. The Manchester City goalkeeper tied the knot with childhood sweetheart Alessia Elefante in Chiesa Madre di San Giorgio Martire in Locorotondo, Italy. He met the interior designer back in 2016 in

items.title: Man Utd player ratings: Joshua Zirkzee fights way back into first-team contention as Shea Lacey puts in mature display
items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED’S wonderkids stole the spotlight as Michael Carrick’s side cruised to a 5-0 pre-season win over Rosenborg in Norway. items.title: Argentina given AUTOMATIC spot in World Cup 2030 after never-before-seen Fifa decision
items.summary: ARGENTINA have already bagged their place in the 2030 World Cup - thanks to being in line to host just ONE clash at the tournament. items.summary: With one round of fixtures left in the Premier Sports Cup group stage, who needs what to progress this weekend?

items.title: Dismissed solicitor is still acting for footballers in brain injury court case
items.summary: Richard Boardman dropped by group of rugby players Football group includes family of Nobby Stiles The solicitor dismissed by a group of over 1,000 rugby players with brain injuries who are suing the sport’s governing bodies is still leading a similar claim on behalf of dozens of former footballers.

items.title: Rangers ticket and hotel packages for games at Ibrox in new 2026/27 Scottish Premiership season
items.summary: RANGERS fans can guarantee their seat at an electric Ibrox Stadium for the new 2026/27 season.
